activities.title: Detect Identity Change
activities.description: Determine whether provider/account/model boundary changed before continuation replay.

activities.title: Flush Remote Continuity
activities.description: Remove provider-specific remote refs and sticky continuation state that cannot cross identity boundaries.

activities.title: Reuse Checkpoint Summary
activities.description: Carry forward local semantic context through checkpoint or synthetic summary warm-start.

activities.title: Build Safe Replay Payload
activities.description: Compose the next request without stale remote refs while preserving safe local context.

activities.title: Establish New Continuity
activities.description: Let the next provider response create fresh remote continuity for the new identity.
